# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  service: service-a
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  service: service-b
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-a-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: service-b
      namespace: default
  allowedServiceAccounts:
    - name: service-b-sa
      namespace: default
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-b-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: service-a
      namespace: default
  allowedServiceAccounts:
    - name: service-a-sa
      namespace: default
  port: 8080
